word: H8458 - תַּחְבֻּלָה - tachbulâh - takh-boo-law' - Good advice

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּחבּוּלה תּחבּלה

Transliteration: tachbûlâh tachbûlâh

Phonetic: takh-boo-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. direction, counsel, guidance, good advice, (wise) counsel
    1. direction, guidance
    2. counsel
      1. good or wise counsel
      2. of the wicked

Origin: from H2254 as denominative from H2256

TWOT entry: 596a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
